description: Shared AI memory platform — gives every LLM (Claude CLI, aicli CLI, Cursor, web UI) identical project memory, billing, multi-LLM workflows, and a unified knowledge graph across all tools.

tech_stack.frontend: Vanilla JS (no framework, no bundler) + Electron shell + Vite dev server
tech_stack.ui_components: xterm.js (embedded terminal) + Monaco editor + Cytoscape.js (graph flows)
tech_stack.storage_primary: JSONL (history.jsonl with rotation to history_YYMMDDHHSS.jsonl, commit_log.jsonl), JSON, CSV
tech_stack.db_schema: Per-project: commits_{p}, events_{p} (phase/feature/session_id indexed), embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}; shared: users, usage_logs, transactions, session_tags, entity_categories, entity_values (parent_id FK for unlimited nesting, due_date tracking)
tech_stack.authentication: JWT (python-jose) + bcrypt + DEV_MODE toggle; 3 roles: admin/paid/free
tech_stack.llm_providers: Claude (Haiku for synthesis), OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok (independent adapters)
tech_stack.workflow_engine: Node-based async DAG executor (asyncio.gather for parallel nodes) + YAML config
tech_stack.memory_synthesis: Claude Haiku for LLM-synthesized /memory; incremental since last_memory_run; 5 output files (CLAUDE.md, MEMORY.md, IDE rules, copilot, aicli rules)
tech_stack.chunking: Smart chunking: summary + per-class/function (Python/JS/TS) + per-section (MD) + per-file (diff)
tech_stack.mcp: Standalone stdio MCP server with 12+ tools (search_memory, get_project_state, get_recent_history, get_roles, get_commits, get_session_tags, set_session_tags, commit_push, create_entity, update_entity, list_entities, get_feature_status)
tech_stack.deployment: Railway (Dockerfile + railway.toml); local: bash ui/start.sh; desktop: Electron-builder
tech_stack.database_schema: Per-project: commits_{p}, events_{p} (phase/feature/session_id indexed), embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}; shared: users, usage_logs, transactions, session_tags, entity_categories, entity_values (parent_id FK for unlimited nesting, due_date tracking)
tech_stack.config_management: config.py with externalized backend_url, haiku_model, db_pool_max, and MCP integration settings

key_decisions: Engine/workspace separation: aicli/ = code only, workspace/ = per-project content, _system/ = project state
Flat file storage primary (JSONL with rotation on /memory); PostgreSQL + pgvector for semantic search; per-project DB tables
Electron UI with xterm.js + Monaco; Vanilla JS frontend (no React/Vue/bundler); Vite dev server for local dev only
JWT auth via python-jose + bcrypt; dev_mode toggle; 3 roles: admin/paid/free
All LLM providers as independent adapters; server holds API keys; client sends NO keys
Nested tags via parent_id FK: unlimited depth (category → tag → subtag) with tree UI in Planner
History rotation on /memory: configurable max_rows (default 500), creates timestamped archive (history_YYMMDDHHSS.jsonl)
Commit-to-prompt linking via source_id timestamp in commit_log.jsonl; bidirectional tagging via POST /entities/events/tag-by-source-id
Port binding safety: freePort() kills stale uvicorn processes before restart; Electron cleanup via process.exit()
AI suggestions as dedicated amber banner between tag bar and messages; Claude Haiku synthesis; auto-save to session with category inheritance
Smart chunking: summary + per-class/function (Python/JS/TS) + per-section (MD) + per-file (diff)
Multi-agent workflows: async DAG executor via asyncio.gather with loop-back + max_iterations cap; Cytoscape.js visualization
MCP server (stdio): 8+ tools for integration with Claude CLI and external agents
Session phase (required field) loads from DB on init; PATCH /chat/sessions/{id}/tags saves phase; backfills history.jsonl; ordered by created_at
Real DB columns for phase, feature, session_id in events_{p} with indexes; tag cache loaded once per project tab (zero DB calls during chat)
implemented_features: 5-layer memory architecture with /memory endpoint + LLM synthesis via Haiku
Unified history.jsonl across all LLM tools (ui, claude_cli, workflow, cursor)
Per-LLM memory files: _system/claude/CLAUDE.md, MEMORY.md, cursor/rules.md, aicli/context.md
Multi-LLM REPL: Claude, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok with streaming + retry
YAML workflow executor: file injection, retry, cost tracking, inject_previous_output
Graph workflow engine: async DAG with Cytoscape.js UI, parallel nodes, loop-back edges
FastAPI backend: auth, chat SSE streaming, projects, admin, billing, git, history, workflows, entities, search
Electron UI: collapsible sidebar, 8 tabs (Chat, Summary, Prompts, Code, Flows, Projects, History, Admin)
JWT auth: admin/paid/free roles; DEV_MODE; first-user=admin; REQUIRE_AUTH toggle
Admin panel: 6 tabs (Users, Pricing, Coupons, API Keys, Usage, Billing/Costs)
Multi-user billing: balance, markup, coupons, transaction log, provider balances
Entity/relationship model: categories, values, events, event_tags, event_links (per-project tables)
Session tags + commit tagging (phase/feature/bug_ref); bulk session-tag endpoint
Projects tab: Features/Tasks/Bugs with status toggle, archive, inline create, event_count
History tab: unified sessions + Commits tab (tag inline) + Tags (⬡) tab with 3-column layout
Smart chunking: summary + per-class/function/section/file-diff with metadata filters
Semantic search: pgvector cosine similarity with language/doc_type/file_path/chunk_type filters
MCP server: 8 tools registered in .mcp.json + .cursor/mcp.json
Per-project DB schema: project_table() + ensure_project_schema(); migration endpoint
Claude CLI hooks: auto-commit-push, log_session_stop (reads .jsonl, updates history)
Git auto-deploy: commit-push from UI, auto-pull, LLM-generated commit messages
4-step project wizard: Basics → Git → IDE Support → Review
UI installer: install.sh (one-time setup) + update.sh (git pull) + start.sh
config.py reads ~/.aicli/config.json for WORKSPACE_DIR at startup
in_progress: Config externalization and optimization (2026-03-16) — backend_url, haiku_model, db_pool_max moved to config.py; removed unused methods; added /health check for MCP readiness

Memory distillation pipeline refinement (2026-03-16) — dual-layer summarization (raw JSONL → interaction_tags → memory files); fixed session_bulk_tag() to write to both event_tags and interaction_tags
MCP tool expansion for project management (2026-03-16) — implemented create_entity, update_entity, list_entities, get_feature_status tools; verified all return accurate JSON
Work item lifecycle tracking (2026-03-15/16) — phase/feature/session_id now real indexed columns in events_{p}; status + due_date tracked in entity_values; backfill on session phase change works
Tag deduplication and cross-view synchronization (2026-03-15) — 149 tags with 0 duplicates; removal via ✕ buttons propagates across Chat/History/Commits; inline commit display per prompt

Pagination and filtering across all views (2026-03-15) — Chat/History/Commits show offset ranges (e.g., '1–100 / 204') with ◀ ▶ navigation; unified history loads all archives; phase filter respects backfilled entries

project_management_page: Project dashboard card: active features (count + top 3), open tasks, recent commits (last 3), workflow runs (last run status + duration)
Activity timeline view: unified event stream (prompts + commits + workflow runs) per project, filterable by type and date
Quick actions panel: + New Feature, + New Task, + New Bug, Run Workflow, Open in Claude CLI
Feature detail panel: click feature → see linked events, commits, workflow runs, related bugs
Kanban-style task board: columns = backlog / in-progress / review / done, drag to move status
Bulk operations: select multiple tasks/features, bulk-tag with phase or entity value
workflow_improvements: Step-by-step run log: per-node timing, token count, cost, output preview in collapsible rows
Re-run from node: click any completed node and re-run from that point with edited prompt
Workflow templates: library of pre-built workflows (feature_cycle, code_review, bug_fix, doc_update) stored in workspace/_templates/workflows/
Feature-linked workflows: when running a workflow, select which feature/task it belongs to; auto-tag all emitted events
Workflow result → task: workflow output can create/update a task entity; closes the loop between AI work and project tracking

deployment.update: bash ui/update.sh (git pull + reinstall deps, never touches workspace/)
deployment.desktop: Electron-builder: Mac dmg (arm64+x64), Windows nsis, Linux AppImage+deb

_synthesis_cache.project_summary: aicli is a shared AI memory platform for developers that unifies history, tagging, and project management across Claude CLI, Cursor, ChatGPT, and other LLM tools. It uses a dual-layer distillation pipeline (raw JSONL → interaction tags → synthesized memory) with a FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL semantic search, and an Electron UI. The system now supports full project lifecycle management with work items (features/bugs/tasks), phase tracking, commit linking, and MCP integration for external agent access.
_synthesis_cache.memory_digest: **[2026-03-16]** `claude_cli` — Config externalization completed: backend_url, haiku_model, db_pool_max moved to config.py for portability; /health check added for MCP readiness verification. **[2026-03-16]** `claude_cli` — Memory distillation pipeline refined with dual-layer summarization (raw JSONL → interaction_tags → 5 output files); session_bulk_tag() now writes to both event_tags and interaction_tags for memory consistency. **[2026-03-16]** `claude_cli` — MCP tool expansion: create_entity, update_entity, list_entities, get_feature_status implemented and verified; enables Claude CLI to create/manage work items directly. **[2026-03-15/16]** `claude_cli` — Work item lifecycle tracking: phase/feature/session_id as real indexed columns in events_{p}; status + due_date in entity_values; phase changes backfill history.jsonl automatically. **[2026-03-15]** `claude_cli` — Tag deduplication verified (149 tags, 0 duplicates); removal via ✕ buttons propagates across Chat/History/Commits views; inline commit display per prompt implemented. **[2026-03-15]** `claude_cli` — Pagination and filtering: Chat/History/Commits show offset ranges with navigation; unified history loads all archives on startup; phase filter respects backfilled entries; commit phase filter added.
